title: References & Project Experience
description: Selected project categories and collaboration formats demonstrating Deepvac's engineering scope. Specific references and case studies will be published as they become available.

industries.title: Application Areas
industries.description: Deepvac develops thermal vacuum systems for customers across these primary application domains.

items.title: Aerospace & Space
items.description: Qualification and validation testing for satellite subsystems, payloads, and mission-critical assemblies.

items.title: Research & Development
items.description: Laboratory-scale and development-phase thermal vacuum testing for academic and institutional research programs.

items.title: Industrial Applications
items.description: Environmental simulation and process validation for industrial components requiring controlled vacuum and thermal conditions.

items.title: Scientific Instrumentation
items.description: Testing of optical, electronic, and precision instrumentation under representative space or vacuum conditions.

projectScope.title: Types of Engagements
projectScope.description: Deepvac supports projects across the full lifecycle of thermal vacuum systems.
